title: Studio – Curated Design Studio
metaDescription: A London-based interior design studio shaping calm, tactile, and quietly confident interiors — working across the UK and on selected international projects.
introText: Every interior begins with how it will be used day to day: the routines, the circulation, and the way light changes across a space. From there, we build a material language that feels calm, tactile, and quietly confident.

founder.heading: Josh Gourgey, Founder.
paragraphs: Curated Design was founded in 2026, built on a background of residential developments across London, hospitality projects — hotels and restaurants — and international work, particularly across the Middle East.

For us, interior design has never been a single calling so much as a range: hands-on site visits alongside the close, technical work of drawing up plans; problem-solving as much as the creative decisions; as much time spent with people as with drawings.

workParagraphs: Clean lines, warm proportions, and details that hold up at close range — joinery, hardware, finishes, and the way materials meet.
Rather than chasing trends, the focus is on layouts that genuinely work, robust materials, and a palette that can evolve with your life or brand.
processNote: No two projects are identical, but this is the shape most follow. Throughout, you'll be closely involved — kept close to the decisions that matter without being buried in the ones that don't — with direct, responsive contact from first sketch to final install.

processSteps.label: Brief & concept
processSteps.head: Listening, then sketching.
processSteps.text: We meet, understand how the space is actually used, then visit and survey it in person before any concept work begins — from there we develop layouts and mood direction around what the site can support.

processSteps.label: Design development
processSteps.head: Resolving the room.
processSteps.text: We produce plans and elevations, then use visualisations to show how the design will actually look and feel before anything is committed to — refining finishes, lighting, and joinery detail through your feedback until the direction is approved.

processSteps.label: Delivery & styling
processSteps.head: Bringing the space to life.
processSteps.text: Once approved, we move into procurement and ordering, coordinate installation with contractors and suppliers, then complete the space with furniture, art, and styling.

locationsText: Based in London, working across the UK and on selected international projects. Collaborations include architects, developers, and private clients on both new-build and refurbishment schemes.
